title: Elon Musk becomes the world’s first trillionaire after SpaceX’s historic IPO
slides: Can one company finally make Musk a trillionaire?

script: One company could make Musk a trillionaire.
SpaceX IPO is over 300 billion dollars.
He already owns Tesla, X, and xAI.
Your portfolio may shift with space growth.
Watch SpaceX stock and rebalance before the wave.

instagram.caption:
A single IPO could push Elon Musk past the trillion-dollar mark—SpaceX enters the public market valued at $300 billion.

He already controls Tesla, X, and xAI. Adding a publicly traded SpaceX gives him a four-company empire in space, cars, social media, and AI.

This shifts where institutional money flows 🚀. If you hold a broad portfolio, space-sector growth may silently eat value from your current tech or energy stocks.

Your content strategy now needs a space angle—don’t let your audience scroll past this sector change without you.

Which of your current investments is most exposed to a space-sector rebalance?
